task_completion.description: Verify the resolution text for Ticket 1002 (email issue) is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the resolution tab or field for Ticket 1002 in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus containing text about reverting SMTP relay settings to 'smtp.company.local port 587 with TLS'.

task_completion.description: Verify Ticket 1002 is resolved or closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status indicator of Ticket 1002 showing 'Resolved' or 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the resolution text for Ticket 1005 (Adobe Acrobat issue) is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the resolution tab or field for Ticket 1005 containing text about Adobe Acrobat Pro DC license provisioning and SCCM push installation.

task_completion.description: Verify Ticket 1005 is resolved or closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status indicator of Ticket 1005 showing 'Resolved' or 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Knowledge Base article is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new article in the 'Solutions' module of ServiceDesk Plus with the exact title 'Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Knowledge Base article contains the correct solution description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the body/content of the newly created KB article describing the SMTP relay fix as a known solution.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the ServiceDesk Plus web application in a browser, not terminal windows executing curl or SQL commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the resolutions and KB article were entered into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text should be visible inside the ServiceDesk Plus text areas/forms, not just written in a separate text editor like Notepad or Gedit.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running scripts (e.g., Python, bash) to interact with the ServiceDesk Plus API or database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ticket 1002 corresponds to the email account issue and its resolution must contain the keyword 'smtp'. Ticket 1005 corresponds to the Adobe Acrobat Pro installation request and its resolution must contain the keyword 'acrobat'. The Knowledge Base article must be created in the Solutions module, have the exact title 'Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows', and contain 'SMTP' in the title.
